title: PT Pupuk Iskandar Muda ransomware incident

extortion.description: www.pim.co.id https://www.zoominfo.com/c/pt-pupuk-iskandar-muda/372769605 PT Pupuk Iskandar Muda is a chemical manufacturing company based in Lhokseumawe, Aceh. As a subsidiary of PT PIHC, they focus on producing two key agricultural products: urea and ammonia fertilizers. Their factory helps farmers across Indonesia grow better crops by creating high-quality chemical fertilizers that improve soil nutrition and support agricultural productivity.
